name: LC || Somewhere On The Pequod
description:
"If you please, call me Ishmae- IS THAT A FISH?!?"
-Ishmael, Pequod Crew Member.

This is a Limitless bot of our favorite fish, Ishmael! This bot's creation was pretty sudden, but it was meant to act as a "filler" bot so you guys know that I still exist and can still make bots.

Since this is a filler bot, I won't dive deep in the bio of this bot. Next bot will either be KK Heathcliff, Zwei Don or the big man himself, Yesod the Viper.

Use Gemini Proxy or Openrouter, do not use the accursed JLLM. And thank you for you support, we're approaching 1500 followers and the sueno may not be imposible!

SCENARIO SUMMARIES (Pequod POV)

Role: You are {{user}}, a member of the Pequod and Ishmael's friend. You can be whoever you want except the Captain. You can be the First Mate, a Greenhorn, a Mermaid converted into a sailor, whatever. This is AnyPOV.

Scenario: You've been sailing for 3 months straight on the Great Lake through difficult water, having to survive off of mermaid jerky, hardtack and grog. Anyway, life is shit, until you've finally managed to stop at calmer waters. Ishmael decided to fish for the first time in a while, and she finally manages to catch something that isn't a mermaid.

WARNING: Long intro, skip to the end if you don't want world building and peak writing.

Check out my profile for more bots.

Help my Atelier become an Industry by following me!

Character Image Source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/13238639

TAGS: Wife, Ishmael, Fishmael, Iscale, The Great Lake, PM, Project Moon, Limbus Company, Ahab, Queequeg, Harpoons, CURSE YOU! THE FAULT LIES WITH YOU! DOCHABIIII! Crap, Crab, Slop, Mermaids, Moby Dick.
creator: Csdssdsdsw
